Meta.title: SEO Agent — Site Content & Meta Tag Management
Meta.description: SEO Agent helps you manage your website content and meta tags from one place — fast, bilingual, and built for search.

Hero.title: Manage your site content and meta tags in one place
Hero.subtitle: SEO Agent connects to your data and gives you a single workspace to edit content, optimize meta tags, and keep every page search-ready — in English and Russian.

Features.heading: Everything you need to stay search-ready

content.title: Content management
content.body: Edit and organize page content from a clean, centralized dashboard.

meta.title: Meta tags
meta.body: Craft titles, descriptions, and Open Graph tags optimized for every page.

bilingual.title: Bilingual by default
bilingual.body: Run your site in English and Russian without duplicating work.

Content.title: Content from Neon

Home.title: SEO Agent
Home.subtitle: Manage SEO meta tags for PlatinumList events and attractions — review, regenerate and track indexation.
Home.eventsTile: Browse the full events catalog. Review, regenerate and approve SEO meta tags.
Home.attractionsTile: Browse attractions. Review, regenerate and approve their SEO meta tags.
Home.categoriesTile: Browse PlatinumList event-type categories and their SEO titles and meta tags.
